title: Export Timeline as PDF

posts.author: lucky123 (Martina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,

I have a dashboard consisting of 3-4 boards. So the data from the boards are displayed in the dashboard. I have also added a timeline widget for the view of my data.

Now my question: Is it possible to export the timeline widget as a pdf file and set the time period?

For example, my dashboard contains data from January 2023-December 2023.

However, I would like to export this timeline view as a PDF and restrict the time period from May 2023-September 2023.

Does anyone have a solution for this?

I already use the Monday-Add On ‘Board Print to Pdf’ but here the entire period of the board is exported. Unfortunately, it is not possible to set the time period.

Hope soneone can help.

Kind regards
Lucky

posts.author: DipaliPatankar (Dipali Patankar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Martina
The way I do it is zoom into the dashboard to see the dates I want and then export to PDF. That seems to just export the period I was viewing

There may be other better solutions, but this one is working for me.

Do post if you find a better way to do this.
Thanks
Dipali
